# Summit RC Readiness Report

**Report version**: 1
**Release target**: v4.6.0
**Branch audited**: `main` (SHA at RC gate: see stamp file)
**Generated by**: `scripts/rc-check.sh` — deterministic, no timestamps in this file
**Stamp file**: `artifacts/rc-readiness-stamp.txt` (runtime-only, not committed)

---

## Gate Summary

| # | Gate | Status | Canonical Source | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-----------------|-------|
| G-1 | Release Readiness CI | — | `.github/workflows/release-readiness.yml` | Must be GREEN on main |
| G-2 | GA Verify (local) | — | `scripts/release/ga_verify.mjs` | Run: `node scripts/release/ga_verify.mjs` |
| G-3 | Governance Lockfile | — | `scripts/release/verify_governance_lockfile.sh` | Supply-chain integrity |
| G-4 | Go-Live Evidence Gate | — | `.github/workflows/go-live-gate.yml` | CI artifact required |
| G-5 | Post-Deploy Validation | — | `scripts/validate-summit-deploy.mjs` | Run at T+15m post-deploy |
| G-6 | GA Regression Detection | — | `scripts/detect-ga-regressions.mjs` | Run at T+1h post-deploy |
| G-7 | Rollback Rehearsal | — | `RUNBOOKS/GA_RELEASE.md §Rollback` | Operator sign-off required |
| G-8 | Go/No-Go Signoff | — | `GO_NO_GO_GATE.md` | All roles must sign |

Status key: `PASS` | `FAIL` | `SKIP (justified)` | `—` (not yet evaluated)

Fill in status values when running pre-GA evaluation. Do not place timestamps here.

## Blocker Status

Blockers from `FINAL_READINESS_REPORT.md` (last evaluated: v4.6.0-rc.1 cut):

| ID | Blocker | Resolution |
|----|---------|-----------|
| B-1 | Audit logging persistent (not console-only) | OPEN |
| B-2 | Test infrastructure (187 patterns disabled) | OPEN |
| B-3 | Tenant isolation tests real (not mocked) | OPEN |
| B-4 | Security tests re-enabled | OPEN |
| B-5 | Gate services instantiated in production | OPEN |

For each OPEN blocker: fill in "RESOLVED: <commit/PR>" or "DEFERRED: <sprint>, risk owner: <name>" before GA cut.

---

## Evidence Artifact Checklist

| Artifact | Location | Required For |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| GA Verify Report | `artifacts/ga-verify/ga_verify_report.md` | Pre-tag |
| Go-Live Gate bundle | CI workflow artifact on `go-live-gate.yml` run | Pre-tag |
| SBOM (CycloneDX) | GitHub Release attachment | Post-tag |
| SBOM (SPDX) | GitHub Release attachment | Post-tag |
| SLSA Build Provenance | GitHub Release attachment | Post-tag |
| Cosign signature | Sigstore Rekor | Post-tag |
| Post-deploy validation | Run output from `validate-summit-deploy.mjs` | T+15m |
| Signed GO_NO_GO_GATE.md | `GO_NO_GO_GATE.md` committed | Pre-traffic enable |

---

## Canonical Script Entry Points

```bash
# 1. Local RC pre-flight (before any tag)
bash scripts/rc-check.sh

# 2. GA verification report
node scripts/release/ga_verify.mjs --verbose

# 3. Governance lockfile verification
bash scripts/release/verify_governance_lockfile.sh

# 4. Post-deploy validation (T+15m, requires live URL)
node scripts/validate-summit-deploy.mjs --env production --url https://api.summit.example.com

# 5. GA regression detection (T+1h)
node scripts/detect-ga-regressions.mjs
```

---

## RC Summary Recommendation

> Complete the Gate Summary and Blocker Status tables above.
> RC is recommended for GA cut only when all gates are PASS and all blockers
> are either RESOLVED or formally DEFERRED with documented risk owners.

**Current recommendation**: HOLD — blocker evaluation pending (see §Blocker Status).
